description.value: Cost: 1 Effect: Equip or remove a shield. Drawing/stowing a shield requires focused effort and cannot be done as part of a [Move] action. The shield must be readily accessible (on your back, at your side, etc.)

system.effect: Equip or remove a shield. Drawing/stowing a shield requires focused effort and cannot be done as part of a [Move] action. The shield must be readily accessible (on your back, at your side, etc.)
